title: OREGON MOTHERSCARE - 211info
text: HILLSBORO MULTI-SERVICE CENTER OREGON MOTHERSCARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon MothersCare provides prenatal assessments to help women begin the path to prenatal care. Services include pregnancy testing, OHP application assistance, streamlined intake/referral for prenatal care, and dental care referrals. Specialized information and referral also available for WIC, home visitation programs, and other prenatal support services. 1001 SW Baseline Street Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Pregnant women at any stage of pregnancy Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 726-0879 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 726-0879 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 57 Services: Dental Care Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Navigator Programs * Pregnant Individuals Physician Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Pregnancy Testing Specialized Information and Referral * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START HOUSING/SHELTER - COMMUNITY CONNECT HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING REPAIR ASSISTANCE FOR BEAVERTON RESIDENTS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENTER SUPPORT PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION AND ENERGY CONSERVATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOUSING FAMILY ADVOCACY PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES MATERIAL GOODS - SENIOR PORTABLE AC MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL EDUCATION CLASSES UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
